description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a clean, rectangular design with a mix of brick and white exterior walls. The front includes a double garage with two cars parked beneath a cantilevered section of the house, and a paved driveway. The property has a spacious rooftop terrace with outdoor seating, a table, and an umbrella, separated by a privacy fence and greenery. Large windows are present on the front and side facades, providing ample natural light to the interior living spaces. The backyard and side yard are covered with green lawn, and the overall layout is open and functional, with clear zones for living, parking, and outdoor relaxation. The architectural style is distinctly modern, emphasizing minimalism and integration with outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with brick and white walls, a double garage, rooftop terrace, and large windows, set on a landscaped lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, cantilevered upper section, paved driveway, and rooftop terrace with outdoor furniture.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick facade, large windows, and the green lawn extending along the side of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard lawn, the back entrance, and the separated rooftop terrace area with seating and umbrella.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the privacy fence around the terrace, the garage entrance, and the overall rectangular form of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
